query:
SELECT 
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.title,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  COUNT(ap.alunoId) AS participantes_sem_sessao,
  CASE WHEN ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-23' THEN 'FUTURO (normal)' ELSE 'PASSADO (gap real)' END AS classificacao
FROM mentor_appointments ma
JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
WHERE ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ma.scheduledDate <= '2026-03-31'
AND ma.status != 'cancelado'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM mentoring_sessions ms
  WHERE ms.consultorId = ma.consultorId
  AND ms.sessionDate = ma.scheduledDate
  AND ms.alunoId = ap.alunoId
)
GROUP BY ma.scheduledDate, ma.title, c.name
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate;

SELECT 
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.title,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  COUNT(ap.alunoId) AS participantes_sem_sessao,
  CASE WHEN ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-23' THEN 'FUTURO (normal)' ELSE 'PASSADO (gap real)' END AS classificacao
FROM mentor_appointments ma
JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ma.consultorId = c.id
WHERE ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ma.scheduledDate <= '2026-03-31'
AND ma.status != 'cancelado'
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM mentoring_sessions ms
  WHERE ms.consultorId = ma.consultorId
  AND ms.sessionDate = ma.scheduledDate
  AND ms.alunoId = ap.alunoId
)
GROUP BY ma.scheduledDate, ma.title, c.name
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate;
